name: ASRock Z790M PG Lightning/D4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR4-5333+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - Intel GbE LAN

description: ASRock Z790M PG Lightning/D4 Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 socket with DDR4 support and PCIe 4.0.
